narrative: Strait of Hormuz closure drives a geopolitical risk premium as WTI surges toward $100 — USD/JPY firms to 157.62, supported by a 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage despite rising Middle East tensions. JPY remains the G8 laggard (-0.657% avg) as the AUD/JPY spread widens to 1.046%; gold higher +0.14% near $4,735; equities +0.19%; DXY +0.18%; VIX 18.4. Watch BoJ Meeting Summary at 23:50 UTC for hawkish policy shifts.
